calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-24-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Petitioner. Michele Renee Becker was sworn and examined. The Court grants decree changing Petitioner's name to Winona Azure. Decree signed in open court.
